name: stage2-rvv-production-selected-dispatch-admission
title: Stage2 RVV production-kernel selected-dispatch performance-admission campaign
description: Macro campaign for Stage2 RVV production-kernel selected-dispatch performance admission. Gate 1 hardened selected-dispatch case/fallback mirror tie-back; Gate 2 carries packed-i4 no-win policy output through provider-owned selected-dispatch facts into target mirrors.
creator: codex
notes: Gate 1 slice complete: RVVLowPrecisionPerformancePolicy verifies selected-dispatch case/fallback mirrors against structured dispatch boundary fields, and target artifact validation rejects stale provider selected-dispatch mirrors even when candidate metadata matches them. Gate 2 slice complete: packed-i4 no-win policy output is populated as provider-owned selected-dispatch policy-output facts, emitted as target/header mirrors, and rejected when stale or metadata-only. Gates 3-4 remain open. No ssh rvv evidence was required because this slice changes policy/target mirror contracts and diagnostics only, not generated runtime, correctness, or performance behavior.
